results.title: Armor King Reviews
results.content:
Feb 10, 2019

Image 30: Rated 5 out of 5 stars

## Awesome Product, just bought a second case
Bought a case a few months ago, the R-Just with the rubber shock pad for an iPhone 8 plus. I love it. The only complaint I have is that the small piece which is used to to turn your ringer on/off broke. It was mainly my own fault since I didn't seat the phone properly, but if it was a better material it might not have broken. Overall I love these cases. They are unique, colorful, and very good at keeping my phone protected. I believe they are made of the same material as a MacBook. Lightweight, ridgid and durable. And they look super-spacey-science-fictiony. If that's your thing, like it is mine, you will really like this product.

February 10, 2019

## Scammed
Scammed, bought an item, their site said it would take 7-10 days, ended up waiting a month before opening case through PayPal, messaged the seller, they assured me my package was on the way and showed a screen shot of the package shipping, showing in was in my country, told me it would likely take 20 days total. 3 months after still didn't get the item and opened another case. Said they won't refund me unless I return the item that I never received.
